---
title: "Blog"
css: styles.css
listing:
  contents: "."      # Tells Quarto where to look for the posts
  sort: "date desc"  # Replicates the reverse chronological order
  type: default      # Gives you that classic stream-of-posts look
  max-description-length: 600  # Increases the text snippet length
  page-size: 8       # Creates pagination with 8 posts per page
  fields: [date, title, author, description]
  feed: true             # Enables RSS feed generation
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false     # Hides the sort dropdown menu
  filter-ui: false   # Hides the search bar
---

*Welcome to the new-style blog. Click on a title to see the full post.*

<hr>
